serveGate_built.what: serving/abstention_serve.py: AbstentionPolicy + policy_from_cert(cert_json) loads the frontier's operating point and enforces it at serve time from the quant top1-top2 margin ALONE (no FP model). A None operating point RAISES, never falls back to answering everything.
